name: Pork Chops & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 cups salted water to a boil.
2. Add the uncooked rice and cook until tender.
3. Season the pork chops with flour and salt, then brown in oil.
4. Add the mushroom soup and 1/4 cup of water. Cover and cook for 15 minutes.
5. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish. Cover with rice, then place the pork chops on top and add more gravy if desired.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-45 minutes or until the pork chops are tender.
